1735370.name: Necrowave
1735370.description:
Experience the emotional life of a zombie with his butt stuck in a microwave. It's a 2D platformer with critical thinking based combat where each different enemy feels like a puzzle to solve instead of relying on brute hack & slash tactics. Almost everything in the game dies in one hit, including you. So caution and critical thinking is highly incentivized.

-Discover a dark & beautiful hand crafted world filled with secrets and mysteries.

-Enjoy a world filled with fully traditionally animated characters and enemies.

-Meet unique and fascinating characters that will impact you throughout your journey.

-Fight epic boss fights where critical thinking is a must.

-Explore difficult challenges that test your fighting, platforming & critical thinking skills to their very limit.

-Gain new abilities that will help you traverse and unlock different parts of the world.

-Decide your ultimate fate depending on what choices you make throughout your journey.
1735370.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
